---
title: Nick Rosenberger
last: Rosenberger
first: Nick
people_group: "collaborators"
email: "nick.rosenberger@nature.uni-freiburg.de"
education:
  - Ph.D Ecology | University of California Davis | 2023
subtitle: "Plant pollinator extraordinaire"
description: ""
# project: "dmref"
affiliation: University of Freiburg
image: nick-mugshot.jpg
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image: nick-mugshot.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:nick.rosenberger@nature.uni-freiburg.de
    # - text: Google Scholar
    #   icon: mortarboard 
    #   href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=54mZFJAAAAAJ&hl=en
    # - icon: github
    #   text: GitHub 
    #   href: https://github.com/jhemberger
    # - text: CV
    #   href: https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/tlnihf3uocmbhm23tsv2m/hemberger-cv-2025.pdf?rlkey=cxufahm3l7ci59p4emjzqwon7&st=4mlanu9d&dl=0
    #   icon: file-pdf
---

::: {#about}

## Education

<!--{{< meta education >}}-->
:::
